items.title: Qatar Airways Bets On RTX Data Platform To Boost Fleet Reliability
items.description: Collins Aerospace, a unit of RTX Corp, will provide its Ascentia analytics platform to Qatar Airways to optimize its fleet health.

items.title: Viasat to supercharge business aviation in-flight connectivity for JetXP customers with global multi-orbit capabilities
items.author: Viasat Inc.
items.description: Viasat plans to integrate Telesat Lightspeed Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite capacity into its JetXP in-flight broadband service, combining GEO and LEO capabilities to improve connectivity performance for business aviation customers.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Expanding technological capabilities, introducing innovative multi-orbit connectivity solution, and demonstrating leadership in satellite communications
